race.description: Tabtouch Supports Pinjarra Park Racing Mdn
race.comment: SASSY SNIPPET (12) has been very impressive in stronger company, missing by a head last start on the main track here as the race favourite. An easier race today is a big tick and Pike remains on board. She's clearly the one to beat in this field, with the rise in trip not looking an issue. GOLD AND GREY (15) stuck on well first-up off a long break at York. She was only 1.9L off the winner there and Riordan hops on board today, getting her down in the weights. The rise in trip looks to suit and she can play a leading role. LEG GODT (14) stuck on well when racing on the main track here 22 days ago, finishing off 1.8L off the winner. Getting out to 1400m is a big tick and Chris Parnham sticking with her is also. Can put her best foot forward. THINK SHE SPARKS (11) can be in the finish on resumption. TASMAN JEWEL (10) won't be far away if she can hold her form.
